Bruh...   Just get nice dress shoes 🤦‍♂️

Nike is releasing patent leather AF1s to wear with a suit.





— https://nitter.net/mymixtapez/status/2032966767258358124#m

Aye we the best!!!!! 🤣🤣🤣🤣

Harry took his head off ⚔️😨😭 @HarryTheHawk

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/ATLHawks/status/2032923785280553098#m

Exactly


OG Jags Fan (@SpinksWilliam)

Probably the two most influential men in teaching me kindness.



— https://nitter.net/SpinksWilliam/status/2033014565600915839#m

Playing the Orlando MAGIC in my CITY on MONDAY! 😉🫵🏾❤️


Atlanta HaWWWWWWWWWks (@ATLHawks)

Next up: Our homestand wraps up on Monday night vs. the Magic.

See y'all back here @StateFarmArena 🎟️ bit.ly/3P8UoWu

That adult is me 🥪

piped.video/shorts/v8uEODmcv…

Atlanta loves U, Murph!


Dale Murphy (@DaleMurphy3)

Thanks so much for the birthday wishes yesterday, everyone! Appreciate it so much. Tough to believe this rookie is 70 years old… Thanks again!





— https://nitter.net/DaleMurphy3/status/2032610387632476513#m

Happy Born Day Hero! Thank U for making my childhood dope cheering for ya! HOF for u is the Goal!


Dale Murphy (@DaleMurphy3)

Thank you!!!



— https://nitter.net/DaleMurphy3/status/2032275372839223560#m

Thank U all for the kind words.


Hip-Hop High Society (@hop_high)

Hip-Hop History 📔
23 years ago, a Monster was unleashed. 🔌🔥

From the Dungeon Family to @runjewels , Killer Mike’s debut album set the stage for a legend. We’re diving into how 'Monster' redefined Atlanta rap and paved the way for a Grammy-sweeping career.

Read more: hiphophighsociety.com/2026/0…

#KillerMike #HipHopHistory #DungeonFamily #RunTheJewels





— https://nitter.net/hop_high/status/2032225382695326000#m

Amen to this, OG.


ICE T (@FINALLEVEL)

No matter what BS you see on Social Media….. Everyone have a GREAT day… No matter what 💎





— https://nitter.net/FINALLEVEL/status/2032095982641435067#m

Happy Born Day To A True Leader!  Love ya OG


Be A King (@BerniceKing)

Happy birthday to my dear Uncle Andy, Ambassador Andrew Young.

Your life of service, courage, and steadfast commitment to justice continues to inspire me and so many others. I am grateful for your wisdom, your example, and the role you have played in helping carry forward the work my father, Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr., helped lead.

Praying for continued blessings, strength, and joy in the year ahead.





— https://nitte

Hollered at my OG Ben of Ben and Jerry's and he needs us on deck to help him change the world for the better even more! 

piped.video/9lXMfGLYoG8?si=y9ZM…

@theswagshopedgewood has always been about more than cuts — it’s about community. Atlanta helped us establish roots, and now we’re honoring those same values as we grow. Big love to @Square for being part of the journey. #ad

I woke up with ‘Mania on my Mind. This beat is so cold I had to kill it. Don’t trip Cody, minor setback for a major comeback and congrats to Jey for getting his first World Title! Inspired By Old Atlanta & TBS! #wrestling #codyrhodes #jeyuso #rap #atlanta
Had to get bro right before his show in the A tomorrow @Tommy Richman
Super rare throwback #netflix #comedy #triggerwarning
To laugh at another man’s fault is to make their same mistake yourself..#addiction #killamike #runthejewels
Outside w the legends! #wwe
Out here #wwe
Shoutout my boy stacks! #andre3000 #scientistsandengineers #grammy #rap
